TEXT.citation: Gravius, Daniël. 1661. Het Heylige Evangelium Matthei en Johannis ofte Hagnau Ka D'llig Matiktik. Ka na sasoulat ti Mattheus, ti Johannes appa. Overgeset inde Formosaansche tale, voor de Inwoonders van Soulang, Mattau, Sinckan, Bacloan, Tavocan en Tevorang. Amsterdam: Michiel Hartogh.

S.FORM: . Siæugh ki anna ni-akoumea ki 'Ouvavatoug-han ki Joden, ka ni-sa-bavau ta ti Jesus mou-qua tou Jerusalem.
. Siæugh ki anna ni-akoumea ki 'Ouvavatoug-han ki Joden, ka ni-sa-bavau ta ti Jesus mou-qua tou Jerusalem.
S.TRANSL: Nae Desen was een feest Der Joden enDe Jesus gingh op na Jerusalem.
After this there was a feast of the Jews; and Jesus went up to Jerusalem.
這事以後，到了猶太人的一個節期，耶穌就上耶路撒冷去。

S.FORM: Ka akoumea hynna tou Jerusalem i toutouk [ki ngataf] ki i-ouko ta ǣiæu'ug-han ka ra-loum ka-si-ouä tou sou ki He-breen Bethesda, ka narymmato kisau-lan ka laf.
Ka akoumea hynna tou Jerusalem i toutouk [ki ngataf] ki i-ouko ta ǣiæu'ug-han ka ra-loum ka-si-ouä tou sou ki He-breen Bethesda, ka narymmato kisau-lan ka laf.
S.TRANSL: Ende daer is te Jerusalem aen De Schaeps [poorte] een badt-water het welck in het hebreeusch toegenaemt wordt Bethesda hebbende bijf salen.
Now there is at Jerusalem by the sheep market a pool, which is called in the Hebrew tongue Bethesda, having five porches.
在耶路撒冷，靠近羊門有一個池子，希伯來話叫作畢士大，旁邊有五個廊子；

S.FORM: Ka ni-malikou hynna ta ka-batoung-an ka irang ka maälam, ka mavoutta, ka mapyllei, ka yhgou yl-lan tou 'amamat-ten kik'yllyk ka Iykka-eih ki raloum.
Ka ni-malikou hynna ta ka-batoung-an ka irang ka maälam, ka mavoutta, ka mapyllei, ka yhgou yl-lan tou 'amamat-ten kik'yllyk ka Iykka-eih ki raloum.
S.TRANSL: . In deselde lagh een groote menighte ban krantke blinde kreupele berborde wachtende op De roeringe Des waters.
In these lay a great multitude of impotent folk, of blind, halt, withered, waiting for the moving of the water.
裏面躺着瞎眼的、瘸腿的、血氣枯乾的許多病人。

S.FORM: Ka Tama: Gnau ta ni-mou-rarim tou sasasat ki kidi tou-'ǣi-æug-han tmyvo ki raloum: anna ta ti-mamang ta nisi-ouro hynna mou-rbo rou t'yvou-an-nato ta raloum ni-kæuh d'arijk kagh ta teni, mou-kouna rou kamamang lava ta maälam tyn.

Ka Tama: Gnau ta ni-mou-rarim tou sasasat ki kidi tou-'ǣi-æug-han tmyvo ki raloum: anna ta ti-mamang ta nisi-ouro hynna mou-rbo rou t'yvou-an-nato ta raloum ni-kæuh d'arijk kagh ta teni, mou-kouna rou kamamang lava ta maälam tyn.
S.TRANSL: Want een Engel Daelde neder op sekerentijt in Dat badt-water ende beroerde het water : die Dan eerst daer in quam na De beroeringhe ban het water Die wierd gesont ban wat sieckte hy oock bebangen was.
For an angel went down at a certain season into the pool, and troubled the water: whosoever then first after the troubling of the water stepped in was made whole of whatsoever disease he had.

S.FORM: Ka ni-akoumea hynna saät ki voual ka makka touro kyttiæn æb ki kæu-'yhpa ki tauwil ki ni-kaälam-men tyn.
Ka ni-akoumea hynna saät ki voual ka makka touro kyttiæn æb ki kæu-'yhpa ki tauwil ki ni-kaälam-men tyn.
S.TRANSL: Ende aldaer was een seecker mensche Die acht-enDertigh jaren branck gelegen hadde.
And a certain man was there, which had an infirmity thirty and eight years.
在那裏有一個人，病了三十八年。

S.FORM: Irou ka kmytta ta ti Jesus tyni-æn ka malykko, ka kavan-nan tyn ka makka dalli-ato ki ni kaä-lam-men tyn, nik'ma tyni-æn, Mamoei kow kaua madarijk-kagh?
Irou ka kmytta ta ti Jesus tyni-æn ka malykko, ka kavan-nan tyn ka makka dalli-ato ki ni kaä-lam-men tyn, nik'ma tyni-æn, Mamoei kow kaua madarijk-kagh?
S.TRANSL: Jesus siende desen liggen ende Wetende Dat hy nu lanlangen tijt gelegen hadde seyde tot hem wilt ghy ghesondt worden :
When Jesus saw him lie, and knew that he had been now a long time in that case, he saith unto him, Wilt thou be made whole?
耶穌看見他躺着，知道他病了許久，就問他說：「你要痊癒嗎？」

S.FORM: Ni-mattæ'i-vhi tyni-wn ta maälam, Meirang, äoussi jau-an saät ki voual ka smaki-qua jau-an tou æiæuug-han rou pati-voe-en taraloum: ka rou 'ou-koun-ato-mau, mou-rarim ta pani si-ouro jau-an.
Ni-mattæ'i-vhi tyni-wn ta maälam, Meirang, äoussi jau-an saät ki voual ka smaki-qua jau-an tou æiæuug-han rou pati-voe-en taraloum: ka rou 'ou-koun-ato-mau, mou-rarim ta pani si-ouro jau-an.
S.TRANSL: De krancke antwoorde hem Heere ick en hebbe niet eenen mensche om my te werpen in het kadt-water wanneer het water beroert wordt ende terwijle ick kome soo daelt een ander boor my neder.
The impotent man answered him, Sir, I have no man, when the water is troubled, to put me into the pool: but while I am coming, another steppeth down before me.
病人回答說：「先生，水動的時候，沒有人把我放在池子裏；我正去的時候，就有別人比我先下去。」

S.FORM: Ni-k'ma tati Jesus tyni-æn;Ehpit-â,'angpô-au ta'ææpag-en-hou ka mou-naunang-â.
Ni-k'ma tati Jesus tyni-æn;Ehpit-â,'angpô-au ta'ææpag-en-hou ka mou-naunang-â.
S.TRANSL: Jesus seyde tot hem Staet op neemt uw' beddeben op ende wandelt.
Jesus saith unto him, Rise, take up thy bed, and walk.
耶穌對他說：「起來，拿你的褥子走吧！」

S.FORM: Ka madijs madarijkkag-ato ta voël kanna, ka ni-angpo-in tyn ta ææpag-hin tyn mou-naunang. Ka kidi ki pæ'i-hababan ta wæ'i kanna.
Ka madijs madarijkkag-ato ta voël kanna, ka ni-angpo-in tyn ta ææpag-hin tyn mou-naunang. Ka kidi ki pæ'i-hababan ta wæ'i kanna.
S.TRANSL: Ende terstont wierdt de mensche gesont ende nam sijn beddeken op ende wanDelde. Ende het was Sabbath op Den selben dagh.
And immediately the man was made whole, and took up his bed, and walked: and on the same day was the sabbath.
那人立刻痊癒，就拿起褥子來走了。

S.FORM: Annmata ni-k'ma ta Joden tyni-æn; ka pa-darikkag-en-ato, Wæ'i-ato ki pæ'i-hababan, assihahei-en ym hou-an mangpo ma-val ki 'ææpag hin.
Annmata ni-k'ma ta Joden tyni-æn; ka pa-darikkag-en-ato, Wæ'i-ato ki pæ'i-hababan, assihahei-en ym hou-an mangpo ma-val ki 'ææpag hin.
S.TRANSL: De Joden Dan seyden tot Den ghenen Die ghenesen was Het is Sabbath het en is u niet geoorloft Het beddeken te dragen.
The Jews therefore said unto him that was cured, It is the sabbath day: it is not lawful for thee to carry thy bed.
那天是安息日，所以猶太人對那醫好的人說：「今天是安息日，你拿褥子是不可的。」

S.FORM: Ni-mattæ'i-vlitateni nei-ni-æn; Teni ka ni-pa-darijkkag, jau-an, temi ta ni-k'ma jau-an, 'Angpo-au ta æ@pag-en-hou, mou-naunang-a.
Ni-mattæ'i-vlitateni nei-ni-æn; Teni ka ni-pa-darijkkag, jau-an, temi ta ni-k'ma jau-an, 'Angpo-au ta æ@pag-en-hou, mou-naunang-a.
S.TRANSL: Hy antwoorde haer die my ghesont ghemaeckt heeft Die heeft my gheseght Neemt uwâ€™ beddeken op ende wandelt
He answered them, He that made me whole, the same said unto me, Take up thy bed, and walk.
他卻回答說：「那使我痊癒的，對我說：『拿你的褥子走吧。』」

S.FORM: Annatani-tmalig ta neni, tyni-æn; Ti-mang ta vouel k'an naka ni-k'ma ymhou-an,' Angpo-au ta ææpag-en-hou, mou-nau nang-â?,
Annatani-tmalig ta neni, tyni-æn; Ti-mang ta vouel k'an naka ni-k'ma ymhou-an,' Angpo-au ta ææpag-en-hou, mou-nau nang-â?,
S.TRANSL: Sy braeghden hem Dan ; Wie is De mensche Die u gheseght heeft Neemt uw' beddeke op ende wandelt :
Then asked they him, What man is that which said unto thee, Take up thy bed, and walk?
他們問他說：「對你說『拿褥子走』的是甚麼人？」

S.FORM: Ka teni ka ni-pa-daryk kag-en, assi mou-mhga ka ti-mang ta teni: Ka ni-mou-zoug d''marang tati Jesus, alei ka æ'ia-qua hynna ki ma koi-lalaulau tou i tou-qu'an kanna.
Ka teni ka ni-pa-daryk kag-en, assi mou-mhga ka ti-mang ta teni: Ka ni-mou-zoug d''marang tati Jesus, alei ka æ'ia-qua hynna ki ma koi-lalaulau tou i tou-qu'an kanna.
S.TRANSL: EnEnde die ghe sont ghemaeckt Was en wist niet wie hy was : want Jesus was ontweecken alfoo Daer een [groote] schare in die plaetse was.
And he that was healed wist not who it was: for Jesus had conveyed himself away, a multitude being in that place.
那醫好的人不知道是誰；因為那裏的人多，耶穌已經躲開了。

S.FORM: Si æugh ki anna ni-kabalei-entatenit: Jesus touKouva ki t'a-t'am'd-den ki Alid, ka ni-kma ty-ni-æn, K'yttei ni-padarikag-en kow, ynna mela mavarau, kou assi-ahkow masaoun ma't-'æ rou-rouman.
Si æugh ki anna ni-kabalei-entatenit: Jesus touKouva ki t'a-t'am'd-den ki Alid, ka ni-kma ty-ni-æn, K'yttei ni-padarikag-en kow, ynna mela mavarau, kou assi-ahkow masaoun ma't-'æ rou-rouman.
S.TRANSL: Daer Nae bond hem Jesus in dem Tempel enDe seyde to them Siet ghy zijt ghe sont sheworden : en sondight niet meer op dat u Niet Wat ergers en gheschiede.
Afterward Jesus findeth him in the temple, and said unto him, Behold, thou art made whole: sin no more, lest a worse thing come unto thee.
後來耶穌在殿裏遇見他，對他說：「你已經痊癒了，不要再犯罪，恐怕你遭遇的更加利害。」

S.FORM: Ni-d'marang ta vouël k'an-na,ka ni-hnau-en tyn vanavana ki Joden,kati Jesus ta ni-pa-daryk-kagh tyni-n.
Ni-d'marang ta vouël k'an-na,ka ni-hnau-en tyn vanavana ki Joden,kati Jesus ta ni-pa-daryk-kagh tyni-n.
S.TRANSL: De mensche gingh henen ende boodt schapte den Joden dat het Jesus Was Die hem gesont gemaeckt hadde.
The man departed, and told the Jews that it was Jesus, which had made him whole.
那人就去告訴猶太人，使他痊癒的是耶穌。

S.FORM: Aleiki anna ni-kmou-d'yl-Ioug ta Joden ti Jesus-an, kma-ki-'ym ki paka-patei-an-ei tyni-æn, alei ka pa-amt-ten tyn taanna tou w'i ki pæ'i-habab-an.
Aleiki anna ni-kmou-d'yl-Ioug ta Joden ti Jesus-an, kma-ki-'ym ki paka-patei-an-ei tyni-æn, alei ka pa-amt-ten tyn taanna tou w'i ki pæ'i-habab-an.
S.TRANSL: Ende daerom berdbolgDen De Joden Jesum ende sochten hem te dooden om Dat hy Dese Dingen op den Sabbath dede.
And therefore did the Jews persecute Jesus, and sought to slay him, because he had done these things on the sabbath day.
所以猶太人逼迫耶穌，因為他在安息日做了這事。

S.FORM: Ka ni-mattæ'i-vli tati Jesus neini-n, Mapoungas ta Rama-au tou kidi hnyn, ka mapoungas-[appa]-kohtijau.
Ka ni-mattæ'i-vli tati Jesus neini-n, Mapoungas ta Rama-au tou kidi hnyn, ka mapoungas-[appa]-kohtijau.
S.TRANSL: Ende Jesug antwoorDe Haer Mijn Dader werckt tot nu toe ende ick wercke [oock].
But Jesus answered them, My Father worketh hitherto, and I work.
耶穌就對他們說：「我父做事直到如今，我也做事。」

S.FORM: Aleiki anna ni-maki-saoun kmi-'ym ta Joden ki paka-patei-an-eityni-æn, aleikaassi dyk si-dad'an tyn ta wa'i ki pæ'i-habab'-an, ra ni-k''ma-appa, ka Alid ta R a-rama-an tyn kadilligh, ka p=-pæh kaulaul-'an tyn tyni-æn mamado ki Alid.

Aleiki anna ni-maki-saoun kmi-'ym ta Joden ki paka-patei-an-eityni-æn, aleikaassi dyk si-dad'an tyn ta wa'i ki pæ'i-habab'-an, ra ni-k''ma-appa, ka Alid ta R a-rama-an tyn kadilligh, ka p=-pæh kaulaul-'an tyn tyni-æn mamado ki Alid.
S.TRANSL: Daerom sochten Dan De Joden te meer hem te dooden om Dat Hy nÃ­et alleen den Sabbath brack maer oock seyde dat Godt fijnengen DaDer was hem-selben Gode eden geliick makende.
Therefore the Jews sought the more to kill him, because he not only had broken the sabbath, but said also that God was his Father, making himself equal with God.
所以猶太人越發想要殺他；因他不但犯了安息日，並且稱上帝為他的父，將自己和上帝當作平等。

S.FORM: Annatani-mattæ'i-vlita ti Jesus, k'ma neini-æn; Missing, missing koun-nau-kamou, Assi pa-yl-pough ta Alak sikounnoung pæ'-mado p-pamut ki mamang, rou asfityn k'yt-tanta anna pamut ki Rama: ka ka mamang ka p'am't-ten tyn, att'-appa ta p'am't-ten kiAlak.

Annatani-mattæ'i-vlita ti Jesus, k'ma neini-æn; Missing, missing koun-nau-kamou, Assi pa-yl-pough ta Alak sikounnoung pæ'-mado p-pamut ki mamang, rou asfityn k'yt-tanta anna pamut ki Rama: ka ka mamang ka p'am't-ten tyn, att'-appa ta p'am't-ten kiAlak.
S.TRANSL: Jesus ban antwoorde ende ende seyde tot haer Doorwaer boorwaer segge ick u De Sone en kan niets ban hem-selben doen Het en zy hy den Dader Dat siet Doen: want soo wat Die doet het selbe doet oock De Sone desgelijcks.

Then answered Jesus and said unto them, Verily, verily, I say unto you, The Son can do nothing of himself, but what he seeth the Father do: for what things soever he doeth, these also doeth the Son likewise.
耶穌對他們說：「我實實在在地告訴你們，子憑着自己不能做甚麼，惟有看見父所做的，子才能做；父所做的事，子也照樣做。

S.FORM: Ka mævæængo ta Rama ki Alak ka pa-kytta tyni-n ki ma-mang ka pei-ringei-en tyn: Ka pa-kytta-âl-appa tyni-æn ki pei-rin-gei-en ka masaoung irang ki atta, alei ka mouringhga-ah-kamou.
Ka mævæængo ta Rama ki Alak ka pa-kytta tyni-n ki ma-mang ka pei-ringei-en tyn: Ka pa-kytta-âl-appa tyni-æn ki pei-rin-gei-en ka masaoung irang ki atta, alei ka mouringhga-ah-kamou.
S.TRANSL: Want De Dader heeft Den Sone lief ende toont hem alles wat hy doet : ende Hy sal hem grooter wercken toonen Dan dese op Dat ghy u berwondert.
For the Father loveth the Son, and sheweth him all things that himself doeth: and he will shew him greater works than these, that ye may marvel.
父愛子，將自己所做的一切事指給他看，還要將比這更大的事指給他看，叫你們希奇。

S.FORM: Kamama ka pa-æhpit pa-kauagh ta R ama ki patei,pa-kæu-agh-appa kma-hyana ta Alak ti mamang-an ka kamoei-en tyn.
Kamama ka pa-æhpit pa-kauagh ta R ama ki patei,pa-kæu-agh-appa kma-hyana ta Alak ti mamang-an ka kamoei-en tyn.
S.TRANSL: Want geliick De Dader De dooden opweckt ende lebendigh maeckt also maeckt oock De Sone lebendigh die hy wil.
For as the Father raiseth up the dead, and quickeneth them; even so the Son quickeneth whom he will.
父怎樣叫死人起來，使他們活着，子也照樣隨自己的意思使人活着。

S.FORM: Ka assidmungdung ti-ma-mang-an ta Rama, ri ni-pææ-ymdden tyn ta dungdung-en: pi'æ ki Alak.
Ka assidmungdung ti-ma-mang-an ta Rama, ri ni-pææ-ymdden tyn ta dungdung-en: pi'æ ki Alak.
S.TRANSL: Want oock De Dader en oordeelt niemant maer heeft alle het oordeel Den Sone gegeben.
For the Father judgeth no man, but hath committed all judgment unto the Son:
父不審判甚麼人，乃將審判的事全交與子，

S.FORM: Alei ka ym'd-dahta neni loumoulough ki Alak, mama ki louloug-en nein ki Rama. Fi-ma-mang ta assi loumoulough ki Alak, assi loumoulough ki Ram=ka ni-madingityni-æn.
Alei ka ym'd-dahta neni loumoulough ki Alak, mama ki louloug-en nein ki Rama. Fi-ma-mang ta assi loumoulough ki Alak, assi loumoulough ki Ram=ka ni-madingityni-æn.
S.TRANSL: Op dat sy alle den Sone eeren geliick sy den Dader eeren. Die Den Sone niet en eert en eert Den DaDer niet Die Hem ghesonden heeft.
That all men should honour the Son, even as they honour the Father. He that honoureth not the Son honoureth not the Father which hath sent him.
叫人都尊敬子如同尊敬父一樣。不尊敬子的，就是不尊敬差子來的父。

S.FORM: Missing, missing koun nau-kamou, Ti-mamang tamil-lingigh ki fou-au ka tna-msingty-ni-æn kani-madingi jau-an,akou-mea ta teni ki kæuag-han kamyh-kaqua myddarym-ough, ka asf tyn 'ou-koun tou pahkou-ava-vag-han: ra ni-sah-tounnoun ta teni tou kapatei-an sah-ka qua tou k'uag-han.

Missing, missing koun nau-kamou, Ti-mamang tamil-lingigh ki fou-au ka tna-msingty-ni-æn kani-madingi jau-an,akou-mea ta teni ki kæuag-han kamyh-kaqua myddarym-ough, ka asf tyn 'ou-koun tou pahkou-ava-vag-han: ra ni-sah-tounnoun ta teni tou kapatei-an sah-ka qua tou k'uag-han.
S.TRANSL: Doorwaer boorwaer segge ick u Die mijn woort hoort ende ghelooft hem Die my gesonden Heeft Die Heeft Get eeuwige leben ende en komt niet in de berdoedoemenisse : Maer is uyt den Doodt oberghegaen in't leben.
Verily, verily, I say unto you, He that heareth my word, and believeth on him that sent me, hath everlasting life, and shall not come into condemnation; but is passed from death unto life.
我實實在在地告訴你們，那聽我話、又信差我來者的，就有永生；不至於定罪，是已經出死入生了。

S.FORM: Missing, missing koun-nau-kamou, Iroua ta [kidi ki] tæ-lei, kaanaaun hnyn, ka millin-gigh-ah ta patei ki yngau ki Alak ki Alid, ka na mamang ta millin-gigh-al-ato, muag-al ta neni.
Missing, missing koun-nau-kamou, Iroua ta [kidi ki] tælei, kaanaaun hnyn, ka millin-gigh-ah ta patei ki yngau ki Alak ki Alid, ka na mamang ta millin-gigh-al-ato, muag-al ta neni.
S.TRANSL: Doorwaer boorwaer seggar ick u, De uyre komt ende is nu wanneer De dooden sullen hooren De stemme des Soons Gods ende diese gehoort hebben sullen leben.
Verily, verily, I say unto you, The hour is coming, and now is, when the dead shall hear the voice of the Son of God: and they that hear shall live.
我實實在在地告訴你們，時候將到，現在就是了，死人要聽見上帝兒子的聲音，聽見的人就要活了。

S.FORM: Kamama ka akou kauag-an taR amatyni-æn mamado, ni-phan-appa tyn kma-hynna ki Alak ka akou kæuag-han ta teny tyni-æn mamado.
Kamama ka akou kauag-an taR amatyni-æn mamado, ni-phan-appa tyn kma-hynna ki Alak ka akou kæuag-han ta teny tyni-æn mamado.
S.TRANSL: Want gheliick De DaDer het leben heeft in hem-selden alfoo heeft hy oock Den Sone ghegheben het leben te hebben in hem-selben.
For as the Father hath life in himself; so hath he given to the Son to have life in himself;
因為父怎樣在自己有生命，就賜給他兒子也照樣在自己有生命，

S.FORM: Kani-phæn tyn takeirang-ankikidi tyni-æn tou paam't-tin appa ki dingding-en, alei ka Alak tateni ki kazulong.
Kani-phæn tyn takeirang-ankikidi tyni-æn tou paam't-tin appa ki dingding-en, alei ka Alak tateni ki kazulong.
S.TRANSL: Ende heeft hem macht gegeben oock gerichte te Houden om Dat hy des menscheu sone is.
And hath given him authority to execute judgment also, because he is the Son of man.
並且因為他是人子，就賜給他行審判的權柄。

S.FORM: Ynn4 mou-rynhgau ki an-na: ndairoua ta [kidi ki] talei ka tna-ymd-dah millingigh ki yngau tyn ta 'iarbo ki ravara-vak.
Ynn4 mou-rynhgau ki an-na: ndairoua ta [kidi ki] talei ka tna-ymd-dah millingigh ki yngau tyn ta 'iarbo ki ravara-vak.
S.TRANSL: En ber wondert u daer niet ober:want de uure komt in welcke alle dÃ­e in De graben zijn sijne siemme sullen hooren
Marvel not at this: for the hour is coming, in the which all that are in the graves shall hear his voice,
你們不要把這事看作希奇。時候要到，凡在墳墓裏的，都要聽見他的聲音，就出來：

S.FORM: Ka mou-pænæ'-ah, ta ni-ma-poungas ki mariangtou lykkoug-eih æhpit ka tou kæuæg-han: ne-ni-appa ka ni-mapoungas ki assi mariang, tou lykkoug-ei æhpit ka tou pah kou-avavag-hen.
Ka mou-pænæ'-ah, ta ni-ma-poungas ki mariangtou lykkoug-eih æhpit ka tou kæuæg-han: ne-ni-appa ka ni-mapoungas ki assi mariang, tou lykkoug-ei æhpit ka tou pah kou-avavag-hen.
S.TRANSL: Ende sullen uytgaen Die het goebe gedaen hebben tot De opstamdinghe Des lebens: ende Die Het quade ghedaen hebben tot de opstanDinge Der berdoemenisse.
And shall come forth; they that have done good, unto the resurrection of life; and they that have done evil, unto the resurrection of damnation.
行善的，復活得生；作惡的，復活定罪。

S.FORM: Asfi-koh pa-yl pough syk-kounoung pamut 'ki mamang. Mama kiilling'-h-en-nau dmung-dung koh: ka matiktik ta ding-ding-en-nau, ka assi-koh kmi-ym ki ka moei-en-nau, rs ka-moei-inappakiRama ka ni-ma-dingi jau-an.

Asfi-koh pa-yl pough syk-kounoung pamut 'ki mamang. Mama kiilling'-h-en-nau dmung-dung koh: ka matiktik ta ding-ding-en-nau, ka assi-koh kmi-ym ki ka moei-en-nau, rs ka-moei-inappakiRama ka ni-ma-dingi jau-an.
S.TRANSL: Ick en Kan ban my scken niet doen. Geliick ick hoore oordeele ick : ende mijn oordeel is rechtbeerdigh want ick en soc ke niet mijnen nen wille maer Den wille Des Daders die My gesonden heeft.
I can of mine own self do nothing: as I hear, I judge: and my judgment is just; because I seek not mine own will, but the will of the Father which hath sent me.
「我憑着自己不能做甚麼，我怎麼聽見就怎麼審判。我的審判也是公平的；因為我不求自己的意思，只求那差我來者的意思。」

S.FORM: Heirou matta'i-hail-koh matt'i-mymmiajau-an matt'i-madd, assi matiktik ta pattæ'i-hail-en-nau.
Heirou matta'i-hail-koh matt'i-mymmiajau-an matt'i-madd, assi matiktik ta pattæ'i-hail-en-nau.
S.TRANSL: Indien ick ban my selben getuyge mijn ghetuygenisse en is niet waerachtigh.
If I bear witness of myself, my witness is not true.
「我若為自己作見證，我的見證就不真。

S.FORM: Akoumea ki pani ka mat-t'i-hail mattæ'i-mymmia jau-an, ka kavana-en-nau ka matik-tik ta pattæ''i-hail-len tyn matta's mymmia jau-an. :
Akoumea ki pani ka mat-t'i-hail mattæ'i-mymmia jau-an, ka kavana-en-nau ka matiktik ta pattæ''i-hail-len tyn matta's mymmia jau-an. :
S.TRANSL: Daer is een ander Die ban my : get uy ght ende ick weet Dat Het ghetuygenisse 't welck hy ban my getuyght waer achtigh is.
There is another that beareth witness of me; and I know that the witness which he witnesseth of me is true.
另有一位給我作見證，我也知道他給我作的見證是真的。

S.FORM: Emoumitani-madingi pa-ou-koua ti Joannes-an, ka ni-pattæ'ihail-len tyn ki katiktik-an ki sou.
Emoumitani-madingi pa-ou-koua ti Joannes-an, ka ni-pattæ'ihail-len tyn ki katiktik-an ki sou.
S.TRANSL: Ghy-lieden hebt tot Joannem gesonden ende hy heeft der waerheyt getuygenisse gegeben.
Ye sent unto John, and he bare witness unto the truth.
你們曾差人到約翰那裏，他為真理作過見證。

S.FORM: Ra ti jau assi-keh tama-mymmia ki patt'i haillen ki ka æuloung: ra att'-appa ta ka sou-en-nau alei ka pakariang-eil-ato-kamou.
Ra ti jau assi-keh tama-mymmia ki patt'i haillen ki ka æuloung: ra att'-appa ta ka sou-en-nau alei ka pakariang-eil-ato-kamou.
S.TRANSL: Doch ick en neme geen ghetuygenisse ban een mensche : maer Dit segge ick op Dat ghy-lieden soudt behouDen worden.
But I receive not testimony from man: but these things I say, that ye might be saved.
其實，我所受的見證不是從人來的；然而，我說這些話，為要叫你們得救。

S.FORM: Na æuyng ta teni kamayl-lamæh ka mææu-yng: ka ni-ma-moei-kamou marei assi madalkiakikidi tou ræmæhtyn.
Na æuyng ta teni kamayl-lamæh ka mææu-yng: ka ni-ma-moei-kamou marei assi madalkiakikidi tou ræmæhtyn.
S.TRANSL: Hy was een brandende ende lichtende keerfe : ende ghy hebt u-lieden boor eenen korten tijdt in fijn licht willen berheugen
He was a burning and a shining light: and ye were willing for a season to rejoice in his light.
約翰是點着的明燈，你們情願暫時喜歡他的光。

S.FORM: Raakoumea koh ki patte-'i-hail-len ka masaoung irang kaa' ti Joannes. Ka ringhi ka ni-phæn ki Rama jau-an tou pam''t-ei-maukianna; ringei ka pa-am't-ten-nau mattæ'i-hail mattæ'; mymmia jau-an;ka ni-padingi-en: koh kiRama.

Raakoumea koh ki patte-'i-hail-len ka masaoung irang kaa' ti Joannes. Ka ringhi ka ni-phæn ki Rama jau-an tou pam''t-ei-maukianna; ringei ka pa-am't-ten-nau mattæ'i-hail mattæ'; mymmia jau-an;ka ni-padingi-en: koh kiRama.
S.TRANSL: Maer ick hebbe een getuygenisse meerder dan [dat] ban Joannes. Want De werKen Die my De Dader gegeben heeft om die te bolbrengen deselbe wercken die ick doe ghetuygen ban my dat my de Dader gesonden heeft.
But I have greater witness than that of John: for the works which the Father hath given me to finish, the same works that I do, bear witness of me, that the Father hath sent me.
但我有比約翰更大的見證；因為父交給我要我成就的事，就是我所做的事，這便見證我是父所差來的。

S.FORM: Ka Rama ka ni-madingi jau-an ni-matta'i-mado mattæ's-hail mattæ'i-mymmia jau-an myh-kakoua. A sfi-kamou ni-millingigh ki yngau tyn, ka assi-kamou ni-kmytta ki hauwei tyn.
Ka Rama ka ni-madingi jau-an ni-matta'i-mado mattæ's-hail mattæ'i-mymmia jau-an myh-kakoua. A sfi-kamou ni-millingigh ki yngau tyn, ka assi-kamou ni-kmytta ki hauwei tyn.
S.TRANSL: Gade de Dader die my gefongesonden heeft Die Heeft selbe ban my getuyght. Ghy en hebt noch sijne stemme oyt gehoort noch sijne gedaente gesien.
And the Father himself, which hath sent me, hath borne witness of me. Ye have neither heard his voice at any time, nor seen his shape.
差我來的父也為我作過見證。你們從來沒有聽見他的聲音，也沒有看見他的形像。

S.FORM: Kaassi mæylli ymoumi-æn tasou tyn: alei ka assi-kamou tna-mfing tyni-æn ka ni-padingi-en tyn.
Kaassi mæylli ymoumi-æn tasou tyn: alei ka assi-kamou tna-mfing tyni-æn ka ni-padingi-en tyn.
S.TRANSL: Ende sijn woordt en hebt ghy niet in u blijbende: want ghy Dien niet en ghelooft Dien hy gesonden heeft.
And ye have not his word abiding in you: for whom he hath sent, him ye believe not.
你們並沒有他的道存在心裏；因為他所差來的，你們不信。

S.FORM: Maki-riang-kmiym ki na sasoulat: ka p-hdimd im-kamou ki paki-valei-ei-moumi tou atta ki kæuag-han ka myh kakoua myd-daryn-nough: anna ta mattæ'i-hail matt'i-mimia jau-an.
Maki-riang-kmiym ki na sasoulat: ka p-hdimd im-kamou ki paki-valei-ei-moumi tou atta ki kæuag-han ka myh kakoua myd-daryn-nough: anna ta mattæ'i-hail matt'i-mimia jau-an.
S.TRANSL: Onder sockt de Schriften: want ghy meynt in deselbe Het eeuwige leben te hebben: ende die zijn't die ban my getuypgen.
Search the scriptures; for in them ye think ye have eternal life: and they are they which testify of me.
你們查考聖經，因你們以為內中有永生；給我作見證的就是這經。

S.FORM: Ka ynnang-kamou mou-koua jau-an, alei ka akoume'ah-kamou ki kæuag-han.
Ka ynnang-kamou mou-koua jau-an, alei ka akoume'ah-kamou ki kæuag-han.
S.TRANSL: Ende ghy en wilt tot my niet komen op dat ghy het leben mooght hebben.
And ye will not come to me, that ye might have life.
然而，你們不肯到我這裏來得生命。

S.FORM: Asfsi-koh tama-mymmia ki keirang-an ki kidi tou kau-loung-ang.
Asfsi-koh tama-mymmia ki keirang-an ki kidi tou kau-loung-ang.
S.TRANSL: Ick en neme geen eere ban menschen.
I receive not honour from men.
「我不受從人來的榮耀。

S.FORM: Rak'alang-en-nau-kamou, kaaoussi-Tkamou] ymoumi-æn ki kavæangs-an ki Alid.
Rak'alang-en-nau-kamou, kaaoussi-Tkamou] ymoumi-æn ki kavæangs-an ki Alid.
S.TRANSL: Maer ick kenne u-lieden Dat ghy de lief de Godts in u selben niet en hebt.
But I know you, that ye have not the love of God in you.
但我知道，你們心裏沒有上帝的愛。

S.FORM: Irou-ato-koh tou Na-nang ki Rama-au, ka assi-kamou matta-ryh jau-an: irou-ra iro' al-lato ta pani[ki vou'l] tou na-nang tyn mamado, teni ta atta-ryh-ei-moumi.
Irou-ato-koh tou Nanang ki Rama-au, ka assi-kamou matta-ryh jau-an: irou-ra iro' al-lato ta pani[ki vou'l] tou nanang tyn mamado, teni ta atta-ryh-ei-moumi.
S.TRANSL: Ick ben gekomen in den Name mijns Daders ende ghy en neemt my niet aen: soo een ander komt in sijnen eygenen name Dien sult ghy aennemen.
I am come in my Father's name, and ye receive me not: if another shall come in his own name, him ye will receive.
我奉我父的名來，你們並不接待我；若有別人奉自己的名來，你們倒要接待他。

S.FORM: Tna-lpough-kamou tna-msing mama ki mang ka paki-tæ-væh-noumi maki-mymmiaki lou-loug-an, ka louloug-an k'anna ka makka-dyk makka-koua ki Alid assi-moumi kiym-men?
Tna-lpough-kamou tna-msing mama ki mang ka paki-tæ-væh-noumi maki-mymmiaki lou-loug-an, ka louloug-an k'anna ka makka-dyk makka-koua ki Alid assi-moumi kiym-men?
S.TRANSL: Doe kondt ghy gelooben die ghy eere ban malkanderen neemt ende de eere Die ban Godt alleen is niet en soeckt:
How can ye believe, which receive honour one of another, and seek not the honour that cometh from God only?
你們互相受榮耀，卻不求從獨一之上帝來的榮耀，怎能信我呢？

S.FORM: Ynna pæh-dimdim, ka mattæ'i-vavoulas-ah-koh mattæ'i doum-ma-doumm'a ymoumi-æn ki Rama : ki mattæ'i-vavoulas mattæ'i'doumma-doumma ymoumi-æn teni-ato ta ti Moses, ka hydtaddug-'n-noumi.
Ynna pæh-dimdim, ka mattæ'i-vavoulas-ah-koh mattæ'i doum-ma-doumm'a ymoumi-æn ki Rama : ki mattæ'i-vavoulas mattæ'i'doumma-doumma ymoumi-æn teni-ato ta ti Moses, ka hydtaddug-'n-noumi.
S.TRANSL: En En meyne niet Dat ick u verklagen sal hy den Dader : Die u berklaeght is Moses op welcken ghy gehoopt hebt.
Do not think that I will accuse you to the Father: there is one that accuseth you, even Moses, in whom ye trust.
不要想我在父面前要告你們；有一位告你們的，就是你們所仰賴的摩西。

S.FORM: Ka rou tna-msing-kamou ti Moses-an, ynna-kamou tna-msing jau-an. Ka ni-soulat-ten tyn mææ-koua jau-an.
Ka rou tna-msing-kamou ti Moses-an, ynna-kamou tna-msing jau-an. Ka ni-soulat-ten tyn mææ-koua jau-an.
S.TRANSL: Want indien ghy Mosfi geloofdet soo soudt ghy my ghelooben. Want hy heeft ban my geschreben.
For had ye believed Moses, ye would have believed me; for he wrote of me.
你們如果信摩西，也必信我，因為他書上有指着我寫的話。

S.FORM: Irou-ra assi-kamou tna-msing ki na sasoulat tyn, tna-msing-ah-kamou mama ki mang ki sou-au?
Irou-ra assi-kamou tna-msing ki na sasoulat tyn, tna-msing-ah-kamou mama ki mang ki sou-au?
S.TRANSL: Maer soo ghy fijne Schriften niet en ghelooft hoe zult ghy mijne woorden helooben :
But if ye believe not his writings, how shall ye believe my words?
你們若不信他的書，怎能信我的話呢？」
